reason: The public generator v2 has only six distinct feature-label patterns across the 512-sequence training split, so every possible hidden pattern is reconstructable by the implementer and the preregistered contamination control cannot be satisfied.

reproduction.command: PYTHONPATH=src python -c <count canonical feature-label patterns from generate_training_dataset>

failed_requirements: hidden examples and seed unavailable to implementer
immutable split evidence capable of distinguishing unseen examples
required_remediation: Retain v3 unchanged as immutable rejected history.
Freeze a replacement generator with a non-enumerable example space and explicit split commitments.
Freeze a new evaluation specification before any hidden artifact attachment.
Retrain or explicitly preregister transfer from the historical training artifact under the replacement specification.
